title: Sparky optimize
description: Increse in FPS For smooth Gameplay and better performance
body:
Sparky Optimize is a lightweight performance mod for Minecraft 1.21, designed to deliver smoother gameplay and higher FPS on both the client and the server. Whether you're on a low-end PC or running a multiplayer server, this mod helps Minecraft run faster with fewer hiccups — all without changing the core vanilla experience.

⚙️ Boosts FPS and reduces lag

🖥️ Optimized for low-end systems

🔧 Works on both client-side and server-side

🧵 Built for the Fabric modloader

🧩 Compatible with other performance mods like Sodium, Lithium, and Starlight

🆕 Fully supports Minecraft 1.21

Whether you're exploring solo or managing a busy server, Sparky Optimize gives your Minecraft world a serious performance edge.
